summary: Made two surgical continuity edits: one to carry Chapter 4's unanswered cluster-time request into Leela's opening dread, and one to extend the chapter's exit into the post-seminar aftermath that Chapter 6 begins from.
edits: Linked Leela's early anxiety to having left June on read about cluster access the night before.
Added a short closing beat that bridges June's resumed seminar performance to Leela seeking privacy in the building.
